---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for Morpheus
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

<!-- Clear and concise description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem/Use Case

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->

## Alternative Solutions

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? -->

## Implementation Ideas

<!-- Optional: Technical details, API changes, UI mockups, etc. -->

## Examples

<!-- Optional: Examples from other projects or applications -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, screenshots, or mockups -->

## Benefits

<!-- How would this feature benefit users? -->

- [ ] Improves performance
- [ ] Enhances user experience
- [ ] Adds new capability
- [ ] Improves developer experience
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Priority

<!-- How important is this feature to you? -->

- [ ] Critical (blocking my use case)
- [ ] High (would significantly improve experience)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (minor enhancement)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues/discussions to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and solution
- [ ] I have considered alternatives
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional)
